checks.reason: The rescoped node is anchored to the British Museum Jericho Skull date range of 8200-7500 BC.
Kinship supplies the social relationship for remembered dead persons becoming community forebears.
Jericho plastered-skull evidence supports ancestor figures and community forebears, not a direct shamanic-mediation dependency.
The ancestor-veneration node should not turn broad intentional burial evidence into an ancestor-cult prerequisite.
